query:
DELETE m FROM messages m
INNER JOIN conversations c ON m.conversationId = c.id
LEFT JOIN customers cu ON c.customerId = cu.id
WHERE cu.id IS NULL;

DELETE c FROM conversations c
LEFT JOIN customers cu ON c.customerId = cu.id
WHERE cu.id IS NULL;
